'''Phluche Maltrid''' was a business owner on [[Phyrstal Island]] in the resort city of [[Le Yer]] on the planet [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The stooped [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] was known for his strange eerie stares, and also for running a small [[Hydrobike]] [[Phluche's Hydrobikes|business]].<ref name="AI" />

{{Char-stub}}
